title: TNTSweeper
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe4602a0065eccd97cec6dce545ec6b8378a0677.png)


**TNTSweeper** is a forge 1.20.1 mod that adds **MINESWEEPER** to minecraft. This mod adds a variety of blocks, such as "Randomizer Blocks" which randomly decide that it either becomes a BOMB SPACE or a SAFE SPACE.

 

To start playing a game you need to get the "TNTSweeper Creator", once you've obtained the block right click it and a GUI will pop up, you can select 3 difficulties: EASY, MEDIUM and HARD. After selecting your preferred option right click a space to reveal what it is, it isn't guarenteed that the first one you select will be safe so the middle space will always be safe. Once you think you've found a bomb left click it to flag it. You win after all bombs have been discovered. Once you've either failed, won or stopped playing you can remove it by pressing the "Remove Game" button in the GUI. For more infomation on how to play type /TNTSweeper help in-game.

 

**To avoid bugs it is heavily reccomended that you space the games apart from eachother.**

 

**If you find any bugs or oversights comment or DM me on Discord, my username is teamchar1ie.**

Check out my other projects [Here](https://modrinth.com/user/TChar1ie).
